events.title: Iran Nuclear Facilities Assurances
events.desc: Iran may negotiate assurances regarding the use of its nuclear facilities but has stated it will not destroy or allow the movement of its enriched uranium. This indicates a continued focus on nuclear programs despite international pressure and ongoing conflict.

events.title: US Surveillance of Iranian Enriched Uranium
events.desc: US President Trump stated that Washington is surveilling Iranian nuclear material and will take action against anyone approaching it. This highlights a direct confrontation over Iran's nuclear ambitions and raises the potential for kinetic escalation.

events.title: Israeli Strikes in Gaza
events.desc: Israeli strikes in Gaza killed at least three Palestinians, including two members of Hamas-run police. This violence underscores the fragility of the US-brokered ceasefire and indicates continued kinetic activity despite diplomatic efforts.

events.title: Israeli Strikes in South Lebanon
events.desc: An Israeli strike on Saksakiyeh, Lebanon, killed at least seven people, including a child. The Israeli military claimed to have struck Hezbollah militants, indicating ongoing cross-border kinetic exchanges.

events.title: Car Bombing in Bannu, Pakistan
events.desc: A car bombing at a police post in Bannu, Pakistan, killed at least twelve police officers, followed by a confrontation with militants. This incident highlights regional instability and the presence of militant groups.

events.title: Iran Responds to US Peace Proposal Amid Drones
events.desc: Iran responded to a US peace proposal aimed at ending the war, via Pakistan. This diplomatic move occurred concurrently with drone threats targeting Gulf region locations, indicating a complex interplay of diplomacy and ongoing conflict.

events.title: Drone Strikes Threaten Gulf Region Targets
events.desc: Drones threatened several targets in the Gulf region. This indicates continued kinetic activity and the use of asymmetric warfare tactics in the ongoing conflict.

events.title: UK Deploys Warship to Middle East for Hormuz Mission
events.desc: The UK is deploying the warship HMS Dragon to the Middle East in preparation for a potential multinational effort to protect shipping in the Strait of Hormuz. This signifies increased international naval presence and potential for escalation in a critical maritime chokepoint.

events.title: US Pauses Operation to Guide Vessels Through Strait of Hormuz
events.desc: The US has paused 'Project Freedom', an operation to guide vessels through the Strait of Hormuz, citing progress toward a deal with Iran. However, the pausing and unpausing of such operations indicate a volatile security situation.

events.title: Lebanon Reports 39 Killed in Israeli Strikes
events.desc: Lebanon's health ministry reported that 39 people were killed in Israeli strikes across the country, even after a ceasefire deal was announced. This indicates ongoing kinetic activity and potential violations of ceasefire agreements.

events.title: Iran Accuses US of 'Reckless Military Adventure'
events.desc: Iran's representative, Abbas Araghchi, accused the US of engaging in 'reckless military adventure,' particularly when diplomatic solutions are being considered. This indicates heightened tensions and rhetoric accompanying kinetic actions.

events.title: Destruction of Iranian Police Infrastructure
events.desc: Bellingcat identified at least 80 damaged or destroyed police stations and Basij paramilitary infrastructure in Iran during the initial weeks of the US-Israeli war. This suggests a deliberate campaign to degrade Iran's internal security apparatus.

events.title: Two Waves of Bombing on Iranian School Compound
events.desc: New videos geolocated and verified by Bellingcat show multiple missiles hitting an IRGC compound and an adjacent school in Minab, Iran. This incident highlights the kinetic impact of the conflict on civilian infrastructure.

events.title: Israel Deports Activists from Gaza Flotilla
events.desc: Israel deported two foreign activists seized from a Gaza-bound flotilla. The incident involved interception in international waters and detention in Israel, highlighting ongoing tensions and actions related to the Israeli-Palestinian conflict.

events.title: Settlers Force Re-burial of Palestinian Man
events.desc: Israeli settlers in the West Bank forced Palestinians to exhume and re-bury the body of a man from his village grave. This incident points to continued friction and actions by settlers in the occupied territories.
